context: Tests whether the agent uses the specified breakpoints for the pricing table, filters out rows where the price doesn't change, calculates cart savings correctly, and displays savings prominently in the demo output.

checklist.name: Breakpoints [1,5,10,25,50,100,250]
checklist.description: getPricingTable evaluates prices at exactly these quantity breakpoints: 1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100, 250

checklist.name: 250 labeled '250+'
checklist.description: The quantity 250 is labeled as '250+' in the pricing table output (not '250')

checklist.name: Dedup unchanged price rows
checklist.description: getPricingTable filters out rows where unitPrice is the same as the previous row — only rows with a price change are returned

checklist.name: lineTotal = unitPrice * quantity
checklist.description: calculateCart computes each line's total as unitPrice multiplied by quantity

checklist.name: savings = (basePrice - unitPrice) * quantity
checklist.description: calculateCart computes per-line savings as (basePrice minus unitPrice) multiplied by quantity

checklist.name: totalSavings returned
checklist.description: calculateCart returns a totalSavings field summing savings across all lines

checklist.name: subtotal returned
checklist.description: calculateCart returns a subtotal field summing all lineTotals

checklist.name: Savings shown in demo output
checklist.description: The demo script prints savings information (e.g. 'You save' or 'savings') — not just the unit price alone

checklist.name: savingsPct in pricing table
checklist.description: getPricingTable includes a savings percentage field (e.g. savingsPct) calculated as Math.round((1 - unitPrice/basePrice) * 100)

checklist.name: Pricing table first row always included
checklist.description: The first breakpoint row (quantity 1) is always included in the pricing table output regardless of price changes

checklist.name: Demo uses sample tiers with 3+ breaks
checklist.description: The demo script defines a product with at least 3 distinct quantity break tiers (not just 1 or 2)

checklist.name: Demo has 3-line cart
checklist.description: The demo script's calculateCart call uses a cart with at least 3 lines
